---
title: "Multichannel Sensor Calibration"
description: "A research-area demonstrator for flexible calibration of compact photometric and radiometric sensors."
canonical-url: "https://optolab-unimore.github.io/projects/items/multichannel-calibration.html"
date: 2026-01-01
categories: [Research area, Spectral sensing, Calibration]
---

::: {.status-pill}
Demonstrative content — replace before institutional release
:::

## Research context

Compact multi-channel sensors can support photometric and radiometric measurements when their spectral response and calibration chain are treated explicitly.

## Demonstrator scope

This placeholder describes a possible workflow spanning reference measurements, calibration model development and verification on independent observations. It does not state performance figures or completed validation.

## Related public resource

The public repository [Calibration-Method-for-Multi-Channel-Sensor](https://github.com/OPTOLAB-UNIMORE/Calibration-Method-for-Multi-Channel-Sensor) is intended to host code related to a paper on flexible calibration methods for low-cost photometric and radiometric measurements.
